violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by (various food product boxes ). A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

(Chicken) was observed held at (50) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2025
(Various food product ) were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in cooler ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (food prep) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
Per PIC, pastelitos and pastelito fillings were obtained from an unapproved source. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
Sanitizing solution for 3 bay sink in kitchen area was lacking. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025

(Various food product) was observed held at (51-58) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025

(Beef ) was observed thawing in 3 bay sink. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the (all) refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
(Prep unit ) located in the (front kitchen ) area was not in good repair.Ambient temperatures observed at 61DF. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (bandsaw ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
The (wall) in the (back kitchen) area is in poor repair.Observed a hole in wall The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
